executives.name: Gillian Swaby
executives.background: Ms. Swaby has over 35 years' experience in the tertiary education and mining sectors. She has been involved in the uranium industry since 1984. She is a Fellow of the Governance Institute of Australia and the Australian Institute of Company Directors.
